## What does this change, and why?

<!-- The why matters more than the what. What breaks today that this fixes? -->

## How did you verify it?

<!--
Not "it works on my machine". What did you actually run?
For a bug fix: a test that fails before your change and passes after is the fastest path to merge.
-->

- [ ] `pytest` passes (all 77)
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] I added a test for the behaviour I changed — or explained below why one isn't possible

## Anything a reviewer should look at twice?

<!-- Vault format, the BearerGate, new dependencies: say so here. -->
